patch.value:
Dependency path for minimatch: c8 -> test-exclude -> minimatch (9.x had ReDoS in pattern matching). Fixed by updating to c8 v11 which uses test-exclude v8 which depends on minimatch v10.

Dependency path for rollup: vitest -> @vitest/mocker -> vite -> rollup (4.57.1 had arbitrary file write via path traversal). Fixed by adding pnpm.overrides rollup >= 4.59.0.

Both are devDependencies and do not affect the published npm package or end users.
Fix devDependency security vulnerabilities via c8 and rollup updates

Update c8 from v10 to v11 (fixes minimatch ReDoS vulnerabilities in test-exclude) and add pnpm.overrides for rollup >=4.59.0 (fixes Rollup path traversal CVE via vitest -> vite -> rollup chain). All 17 Dependabot alerts resolved.
Dependabot alerts found after push to main
c8 updated to v11; rollup pinned to >=4.59.0 via pnpm.overrides
pnpm audit reports No known vulnerabilities found

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: pnpm audit confirmed: No known vulnerabilities found. All 473 tests pass at 100% coverage after updates.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: c8 10->11 update fixes 4x minimatch vulnerabilities. pnpm.overrides rollup>=4.59.0 fixes rollup path traversal. Both are devDependencies only.
